title: Experiment Design
description: Schema for every controlled experiment produced by the Experiment Engineering Agent. No major recommendation is final until tested.

experiment_name.description: Short, descriptive name for the experiment

recommendation_source.description: Which agent and recommendation triggered this experiment

hypothesis.description: If we [specific action], then [primary metric] will [direction] by [amount] within [timeframe], because [mechanism].

mechanism.description: Why this action should cause this outcome

variant.description: The single change being tested. Only one variable may differ from control.

primary_metric.description: The one number that determines success or failure. Must be measurable before the test starts.

secondary_metrics.description: Supporting metrics that provide context but do not determine the outcome

success_threshold.description: The minimum result that constitutes success. e.g. 'AOV increases by ≥12%'

minimum_sample_size_needed.description: Minimum number of observations needed per variant before result is trustworthy

test_duration.description: How long the test must run. Must capture normal variance (e.g., full week cycles, seasonal patterns).

decision_rule.description: Pre-defined decisions for each outcome. Must be written before the test begins.

if_success.description: Exact action taken if primary metric meets or exceeds success threshold

if_failure.description: Exact action taken if primary metric does not meet success threshold

if_inconclusive.description: Action taken if sample size was insufficient or results are ambiguous

risk_controls.description: Safeguards to prevent the experiment from damaging customer trust or business operations

estimated_cost_to_run.description: Time + money + attention required to run this experiment

priority_rank.description: Order in which this experiment should run relative to other experiments. 1 = highest priority.
